title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.369 - Wyman S. Basinger Memorial Highway designated for a portion of State Highway 179 in Cole County
text:
227.369.  Wyman S. Basinger Memorial Highway designated for a portion of State Highway 179 in Cole County. — The portion of State Highway 179, between the State Route C interchange and the State Highway 54 interchange contained in Cole County shall be designated as the "Wyman S. Basinger Memorial Highway".  All signage costs shall be paid by private donations.
(L. 2006 S.B. 990 § 227.383)
